name: ms365
description: Read and act on your Outlook mail, calendar, Teams chats and SharePoint/OneDrive files via OMI.

tools.name: get_me
tools.description: Get the connected Microsoft user's profile (display name, mail, job title).

tools.name: list_recent_emails
tools.description: List the user's most recent Outlook emails. Use unread_only=true to focus on unread.

tools.name: search_emails
tools.description: Search Outlook emails by free-text query.

tools.name: read_email
tools.description: Read the full body of a specific email by id.

tools.name: list_upcoming_events
tools.description: List the user's upcoming calendar events for the next N days.

tools.name: create_event
tools.description: Create a calendar event, optionally as a Teams online meeting.

tools.name: find_free_slots
tools.description: Find common free time slots for a list of attendees.

tools.name: list_recent_chats
tools.description: List the user's recent Teams chats.

tools.name: send_chat_message
tools.description: Send a Teams chat message to a specific chat id.

tools.name: list_my_teams
tools.description: List the Teams (groups) the user is a member of.

tools.name: create_online_meeting
tools.description: Create a standalone Teams online meeting and return the join URL.

tools.name: list_recent_files
tools.description: List recently used files in OneDrive / SharePoint.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search files in OneDrive by name / content.

tools.name: upload_text_file
tools.description: Upload a small text file (e.g. a transcript) to OneDrive at the given folder path.

folder_path.description: Folder relative to OneDrive root, e.g. 'Documents/OMI'

tools.name: read_file_text
tools.description: Read the text content of a file in OneDrive by item id.
